title: Rotting Oranges
input_format: An `m x n` grid where each cell can be: `0` (empty), `1` (fresh orange), or `2` (rotten orange).
output_format: The minimum number of minutes that must elapse until no cell has a fresh orange. If it is impossible, return `-1`.
constraints:
- `m == grid.length`
- `n == grid[i].length`
- `1 <= m, n <= 10`
- `grid[i][j]` is `0`, `1`, or `2`.
